name: Sugar Cookie Jewels
recipeIngredient: 12 oz. M&M's Baking Bits (choose one flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy; add egg and vanilla.
3. Combine flour and baking soda; stir in M&M's Chocolate Baking Bits.
4. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on greased cookie sheets, about 2-inches apart.
5. Flatten each ball slightly with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar to avoid crushing the baking bits.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until edges are light golden; let cool for 1 minute before removing from oven to wire racks to cool completely.
7. Store in tightly covered containers.
